title: peltophyllum caudatum
intro: Peltophyllum caudatum, also known as the false kapok tree, is a plant species that belongs to the family Melastomataceae. Traditionally, it has been used for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects. The plant is said to offer various health benefits, including relief from fever, headaches, and respiratory issues, as well as being used to treat wounds and skin conditions. In herbal preparations, peltophyllum caudatum is often used as a decoction or infusion, and its extracts have been used in traditional medicine to create tonics and ointments for topical application.
